typical_treatment: Physical therapy, pain medication, possible chiropractic care
notes: Most common car accident injury. Recovery varies widely.

typical_treatment: Physical therapy, epidural injections, possible surgery (discectomy/fusion)
notes: Can be chronic. Surgery significantly increases settlement value.

typical_treatment: Rest, cognitive therapy, neurological monitoring
notes: Symptoms may persist as post-concussion syndrome.

typical_treatment: Emergency surgery, intensive rehab, long-term cognitive therapy
notes: Life-altering injury. May require lifetime care.

typical_treatment: Casting/splinting, possible surgical fixation, physical therapy
notes: Clean breaks heal better. Comminuted fractures increase value.

typical_treatment: Casting or surgical fixation (ORIF), physical therapy, possible hardware removal
notes: Weight-bearing impacts recovery timeline and long-term prognosis.

typical_treatment: Pain management, breathing exercises, activity restriction
notes: Multiple rib fractures or flail chest significantly increases severity.

typical_treatment: Surgery, intensive rehabilitation, assistive devices, ongoing therapy
notes: Partial loss of function. Recovery potential varies.

typical_treatment: Emergency surgery, lifetime care, adaptive equipment, home modification
notes: Permanent paralysis. Includes future care costs and lost earning capacity.

typical_treatment: Arthroscopic surgery, physical therapy, knee brace
notes: Common in slip-and-fall and sports-related incidents.

typical_treatment: Arthroscopic repair surgery, physical therapy, possible cortisone injections
notes: May require 6-12 months recovery. Age affects prognosis.

typical_treatment: Topical treatment, pain medication, wound care
notes: Superficial burns. Usually heal without scarring.

typical_treatment: Wound care, possible skin grafts, pain management, infection prevention
notes: May cause scarring. Larger burn area increases value.

typical_treatment: Skin grafts, multiple surgeries, intensive wound care, psychological therapy
notes: Full-thickness burns. Permanent scarring and possible functional loss.

typical_treatment: RICE protocol, physical therapy, anti-inflammatory medication
notes: Common in minor accidents. Usually resolves fully.

typical_treatment: Emergency surgery, ICU stay, follow-up monitoring
notes: Ruptured spleen, liver laceration, etc. Life-threatening.

typical_treatment: Emergency surgery, prosthetic fitting, physical therapy, psychological counseling
notes: Loss of limb. Includes prosthetic costs and vocational rehabilitation.

typical_treatment: Plastic surgery, scar revision, laser treatment, psychological therapy
notes: Value depends on visibility, location, and impact on daily life.

typical_treatment: Psychotherapy (CBT, EMDR), medication, ongoing counseling
notes: Often accompanies physical injuries. Documented treatment strengthens claim.

typical_treatment: N/A - Claim pursued by surviving family members
notes: Includes lost future earnings, funeral costs, loss of consortium, pain and suffering.

typical_treatment: Wound cleaning, antibiotics, possible plastic surgery, rabies prophylaxis
notes: Strict liability in many states. Owner's insurance typically covers.

typical_treatment: Physical therapy, pain medication, muscle relaxants, possible injections
notes: Common in rear-end collisions. Chronic pain may develop.

typical_treatment: Physical therapy, pain management, ergonomic modifications
notes: Lumbar strain/sprain. Chronic pain increases settlement value.

typical_treatment: Possible surgical reconstruction, wiring, follow-up with oral surgeon
notes: Jaw, cheekbone, orbital fractures. May affect appearance permanently.

typical_treatment: Root canal, crown, implant, dentures
notes: Each tooth replacement adds to damages.

typical_treatment: Ophthalmological surgery, medication, vision therapy
notes: Permanent vision loss dramatically increases value.

typical_treatment: ENT evaluation, hearing aids, possible surgery
notes: Noise-induced or trauma-related. Permanent loss increases value.

typical_treatment: Emergency surgery, possible amputation, rehabilitation
notes: Common in construction and industrial accidents.

typical_treatment: Pain management, nerve blocks, physical therapy, possible surgery
notes: Chronic pain condition. May be permanent.

typical_treatment: Surgical fixation, possible hip replacement, extensive physical therapy
notes: Especially impactful for elderly patients. May require long-term care.

typical_treatment: Reduction, immobilization, physical therapy, possible surgical stabilization
notes: Recurrent dislocations may require surgery.

typical_treatment: Emergency fasciotomy surgery, wound care, rehabilitation
notes: Medical emergency. Delay in treatment can cause permanent damage.
